entity.name: SyncLite Project
entity.description: The SyncLite Project develops and maintains Apache 2.0 licensed open-source software for reliable, vendor-neutral data synchronization.

projects.name: SyncLite
projects.description: Apache 2.0 licensed open-source platform for reliable edge-to-cloud data synchronization.

funding.description: Community funding helps keep SyncLite free, vendor-neutral, secure, well-tested, and sustainably maintained. Contributions support engineering, testing, documentation, CI/CD, cross-platform SDKs, connectors, and long-term project maintenance.

channels.description: Support the SyncLite Project through GitHub Sponsors.

plans.name: Community Supporter
plans.description: Support maintenance, bug fixes, documentation, testing, and releases.

plans.name: Project Sponsor
plans.description: Support new features, SDKs, connectors, developer tooling, and continuous integration.

plans.name: Ecosystem Sponsor
plans.description: Support ecosystem growth, documentation, performance, security, reliability, and long-term sustainability.
